_comment: Stage-2 stack B = Revit + internal KG. CURRENT v1 build, KG_BENCH_MODE=kg-many => kg_* present (incl. the new kg_bind_revit_id) ALONGSIDE the Revit create/query commands. The agent builds for real in Revit, binds each created element into the KG (kg_bind_revit_id with the returned ElementId) and answers from the KG (kg_query/kg_diff_since). 'command' is the ABSOLUTE conda 'revitmcp' node.exe. New profile dir => one-time Claude Code MCP approval + headless probe before any billable run.
